# rig-core

Core library for alma-agentic — multi-provider LLM orchestration, agent workflows, streaming, embeddings, and tool dispatch.

## Providers

OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure, OpenRouter, Ollama, Groq, Together AI.

## Features

- Agentic workflows with multi-turn streaming
- OpenTelemetry GenAI Semantic Convention tracing
- Tool calling with `#[derive(Tool)]` macro
- Embedding workflows with distance metrics
- WASM compatibility

See the [alma-agentic README](../../README.md) for full documentation.
